description: The Islamic Republican Party (Hezb-e Jomhuri-ye Eslami, IRP) was the dominant political party of the early Islamic Republic, co-founded in 1979 by [Ruhollah Khomeini](/people/ruhollah-khomeini)'s inner circle including [Mohammad Beheshti](/people/mohammad-beheshti), [Akbar Hashemi Rafsanjani](/people/akbar-hashemi-rafsanjani), [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei), and [Mohammad-Javad Bahonar](/people/mohammad-javad-bahonar). It dominated the first three [Majlis](/orgs/islamic-consultative-assembly) sessions and the executive branch until its dissolution in 1987 by Khomeini's order, following irreconcilable internal factional disputes. Its dissolution led directly to the formation of the rival [Combatant Clergy Association](/orgs/combatant-clergy-association) and [Association of Combatant Clerics](/orgs/association-of-combatant-clerics) as successor factions.
editorial_notes: Dissolved 1987 by Khomeini. Co-founder Beheshti assassinated in 1981 Hafte Tir bombing. Dominant in 1st and 2nd Majlis sessions.
